creator: dennylin93@hs.ntnu.edu.tw
text:
Hi, thanks for committing PR 144897. Could you please bump the
 PORTREVISION of mail/dovecot-managesieve as well?
 
 If mail/dovecot-managesieve isn't recompiled after upgrading
 mail/dovecot to 1.2.11, it isn't able to run properly and this error
 pops up in maillog:
 Mar 20 16:24:03 mail dovecot: managesieve-login: Fatal: Dovecot version
 mismatch: Master is v1. 2.11, login is v1.2.10 (if you don't care, set
 version_ignore=yes)
 
 -- 
 Denny Lin
